Summer Houses

Contemporary Retreat

A modern take on the classic summer house.

Request Your Free Quote Enquire Now

Gallery

Contemporary Retreat, In Detail

Overview

Contemporary Retreat

A confident, contemporary reinterpretation of the classic summer house, with cleaner lines and larger glazing.

Living With It

Made for the Way You'll Actually Use It

A modern take on the classic summer house. Contemporary Retreat is designed around how you'll really spend time in it, not just how it looks from the garden — a space you'll want to use, not just admire.

Every detail, from the layout to the light, is considered with everyday life in mind — because a building you love using is worth so much more than one you simply own.

Key Features

What's Included

Pressure Treated
Made in Britain
Installation Available
Custom Sizes
Sustainable Timber
10 Year Guarantee (placeholder)

Construction

Built to Last

Built from quality timber with a focus on natural light, every summer house is designed to make the most of long days and warm evenings. Glazing is positioned to capture the best of the garden view, and the timber frame is treated to stand up to years of everyday family use.

Configure Your Building

Available Sizes

Medium 3.5m x 3.0m

The Details

Specification

Available Sizes2.5m x 2.5m, 3.5m x 3.0m, 4.5m x 3.5m
Roof OptionsApex Roof, Pent Roof, Veranda Roof
CladdingPressure-treated timber, finished to order
Base RequirementLevel concrete or paved base recommended
Guarantee10 Year Guarantee (placeholder)

Frequently Asked Questions

Common Questions About Contemporary Retreat

Will it get too hot in summer?

Our summer houses are designed with ventilation and glazing options to keep the space comfortable, even on warmer days.

Can I add insulation later?

Yes — insulation can be added as an optional extra at the time of order, or retrofitted afterwards.

Do you install throughout the year?

Yes, we install year-round, though good weather makes for the smoothest installation.

What maintenance is required?

An annual check of the timber treatment and guttering will keep your summer house looking its best for years to come.
